serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/data_sharing_cockpit
serverInfo.title: data_sharing_cockpit
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the data_sharing_cockpit service.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers
tools.description: Returns a list of all the data providers that the current user has access to. To get access to a data provider, the user needs to be member of the data provider profile. If a contentAggregatorID is given as parameter, all data provider profiles that are managed by that content aggregator are returned.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers
tools.description: Creates a new data provider or a new managed data provider (managed by a content aggregator) based on a configuration following the data provider definition json format. Specify the .json in the request body. To create a managed data provider, specify the contentAggregatorID in the request body. Managed providers can only be created if you are a member of the assigned content aggregator profile.

tools.name: accessProvider
tools.title: accessProvider
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a certain data provider after specifying its UUID or its content aggregator UUID.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The {identifier} can be used in two ways":" provide the UUID of the data provider or the content aggregator (a content aggregator is a data provider as well); or, provide the UUID of a content aggregator and a contentAggregatorProviderID separated by a colon.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_identifier
tools.title: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_identifier
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a data provider after specifying its UUID or its content aggregator UUID.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The {identifier} can be used in two ways":" provide the UUID of the data provider or the content aggregator (a content aggregator is a data provider as well); or, provide the UUID of a content aggregator and a contentAggregatorProviderID separated by a colon.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_identifier
tools.title: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_identifier
tools.description: Updates only selected properties of the specified data provider which are defined in the provided data provider definition json.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The {identifier} can be used in two ways":" provide the UUID of the data provider or the content aggregator (a content aggregator is a data provider as well); or, provide the UUID of a content aggregator and a contentAggregatorProviderID separated by a colon.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Returns a list of all the existing activation keys for a specified data provider.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Holds the state. Either used or unused.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Generates activation keys for a specified data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys_massDelete
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys_massDelete
tools.description: Deletes all the activation keys for a specified data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products
tools.description: Returns a list of all the existing data products assigned to your user. If no parameter is given, it returns all the data products of all the data provider the user has access to. If the given providerUUID represents a content aggregator, all products of all data provider belonging to the content aggregator are returned. If a providerUUID is given, all products of this data provider are returned.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products
tools.description: Creates a new data product based on a configuration following the data product definition json format.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a single data product. To do so, you must specify the data product UUID.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.title: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a specified data product with the provided data from the data product definition json.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.title: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.description: Deletes an existing data product. To do so, you must specify the data product UUID.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.title: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.description: Updates only selected properties of a specified data product which are defined in the provided data product definition json.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.description: Changes the lifecycle status of a data product. To do so, you must specify the data product UUID.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_consumer_products_productUUID_install
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_consumer_products_productUUID_install
tools.description: Install a product for a consumer, after checking if the consumer has a valid license, the product status is listed and the shipment type is "Direct"/"Integrated Delivery". If a user does not have the required context membership to trigger the installation, a 404 is returned.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products
tools.description: Returns a list of all the data products of a data provider that the user has access to.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products
tools.description: Creates a new data product for a specified data provider based on a configuration following the data product definition json format.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a data product. To do so, you must specify the technical ID and data provider UUID or content aggregator UUID.

parameters.name: productIdentifier
parameters.description: The productIdentifier identifies a data product. If the parameter providerUUID represents a data provider a dataProviderProductID (technical name) is required here. If the providerUUID represents a content aggregator, a contentAggregatorProductID (technical name)  is required.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.title: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a specified data product with the provided data in the data product definition json.

parameters.name: productIdentifier
parameters.description: The productIdentifier identifies a data product. If the parameter providerUUID represents a data provider a dataProviderProductID (technical name) is required here. If the providerUUID represents a content aggregator, a contentAggregatorProductID (technical name)  is required.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.title: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.description: Deletes an existing data product of a specified data provider.

parameters.name: productIdentifier
parameters.description: The productIdentifier identifies a data product. If the parameter providerUUID represents a data provider a dataProviderProductID (technical name) is required here. If the providerUUID represents a content aggregator, a contentAggregatorProductID (technical name)  is required.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.title: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.description: Updates only selected properties of a specified data product which are defined in the provided data product definition json.

parameters.name: productIdentifier
parameters.description: The productIdentifier identifies a data product. If the parameter providerUUID represents a data provider a dataProviderProductID (technical name) is required here. If the providerUUID represents a content aggregator, a contentAggregatorProductID (technical name)  is required.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.description: Changes the lifecycle status of a data product. To do so, you must specify the data product UUID.

parameters.name: productIdentifier
parameters.description: The productIdentifier identifies a data product. If the parameter providerUUID represents a data provider a dataProviderProductID (technical name) is required here. If the providerUUID represents a content aggregator, a contentAggregatorProductID (technical name)  is required.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses
tools.description: Returns a simplified list of all the licenses available for your data provider profile.

tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses

tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_massDelete
tools.description: Deletes all the licenses from a specified data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.title: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.title: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.title: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.description: Updates some properties of a specified license. To do so, you must specify the license UUID.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.description: Changes the lifecycle status of a license from Draft to Active, or vice versa.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_products
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_products

tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_products
tools.description: Assigns data products to a license.

tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_products_massDelete
tools.description: Unassigns all the data products from a specified license.

tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Returns a list of all the existing activation keys for a specified license.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Holds the state. Either used or unused.

tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys

tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys_assignUsers
tools.description: Allocate users to existing activation keys.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys_massDelete
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys_massDelete

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases
tools.description: Returns a list of all the releases of a specified data product.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases
tools.description: Creates a new release for a specified data product.

tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a specified release. To do so, you must specify the release UUID.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.title: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a specified release with the provided data in the data product definition file.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.title: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.title: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.description: Updates some properties of a specified release. To do so, you must specify the release UUID.

tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID_publish
tools.description: Publishes a release to make data product updates available to the consumers.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID_lock
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID_lock

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID_unlock
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID_unlock
tools.description: Unlocks a certain release of a specified data product.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_lockAll
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_lockAll

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_unlockAll
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_unlockAll
tools.description: Unlocks all the releases of a specified data product.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts
tools.description: Returns a list of all the contexts of a data provider that the user has access to.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts
tools.description: Creates a new context for a specified data provider based on a configuration following the context definition file format and stored as a .json file.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a context. To do so, you must specify the context UUID and data provider UUID.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.title: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a specified context with the provided data in the context definition json.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.title: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.description: Deletes an existing context from a specified data provider.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.title: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.description: Updates only selected properties of a specified context which are defined in the provided context definition file.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.description: Changes the lifecycle status of a context. To do so, you must specify the context UUID.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_leave
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_leave
tools.description: Leaves a context of a specified data provider":" only applicable if you don't own the data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_join
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_join
tools.description: Joins a context of a specified data provider":" only applicable if you don't own the data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_massDelete
tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_massDelete
tools.description: Deletes all the contexts from a specified data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_activationKeys
tools.title: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Returns a list of all the existing activation keys for a specified context.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Holds the state. Either used or unused.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Contains the member type. Either provider or consumer

tools.title: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_activationKeys
